gist.headline: Daily hive chronicle
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just swept through the README to pin the latest news and community apps to the front page.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the repository README to feature the latest news and recent community applications.
gist.impact: Visitors to the GitHub repository will see the most up-to-date community highlights and project news.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a librarian or newsie, organizing a bulletin board with the latest community apps and news clippings.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning fresh pixelated news clippings to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
